label: Negotiate Contract
description: Initiate a contract negotiation for a specific offer.

params.name: counter_party_address
params.description: DSP endpoint of the counter-party connector

params.name: offer_id
params.description: ID of the offer/policy to negotiate

params.name: asset_id
params.description: ID of the asset to negotiate for

params.name: store_in_variable
params.description: Variable name to store the agreement ID
